title: Unique 80752EU Paper Birthday Napkins-16.5 cm-Dainty Unicorn Party-16 Count (Pack of 1), Multicolour
features: Pack of 16 Dainty Unicorn Birthday Napkins
Paper napkins measure 16.5 cm x 16.5 cm
Ideal for wiping spills at a unicorn themed birthday party
Disposable napkins are made from a sustainable forest source
Combine with other Dainty Unicorn party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Add a touch of cute pastel colour to a young girl's birthday with these Unicorn Party Napkins. This 16-pack of paper napkins features a cute unicorn, rainbow and sun design that will be perfect for a unicorn birthday party. Not only are these napkins stylish, they're also great for cleaning up spills and crumbs. Best of all, these disposable napkins make cleaning up after the celebration is over really quick and easy. The good news is these party napkins are made from a well managed and sustainable forest source, too. Safety Warning No warning applicable
